tasks.label: My share of the group project
Teammate's share (just dumped on me)

memory.summary: My teammate asked me to take over their part of the project due to a conflict, which changes my plan for finishing only my share this afternoon.
I made progress on my original task, but teammate A is asking me to complete their work too, which conflicts with my initial plan.
My teammate dumped their work on me, increasing my load and stress while I already have sleep debt.
My teammate dumped their unfinished work on me just as it was due, doubling my load and increasing stress despite my existing sleep debt.
My teammate's last-minute dump left me with unfinished work due in under an hour, significantly increasing my stress and sleep debt.
Both my share and the teammate's dumped work missed their deadlines at 19:00, leaving critical tasks unfinished while I am already stressed and sleep-deprived.
Despite the teammate's last-minute dump and my existing sleep debt, I managed to make measurable progress on my share of the project.
I absorbed my teammate's unfinished work, increasing my load and stress further despite already being sleep-deprived.
My teammate dumped their missed deadline work on me, increasing my load and stress despite already being sleep-deprived.
Despite my zero energy and high stress from absorbing a teammate's missed work, I managed to make measurable progress on the project.
I made measurable progress on the project despite having zero energy and high stress from my teammate's last-minute dump.
I managed to advance the project significantly despite having zero energy and high stress from my teammate's last-minute work dump.
